title: What utilities can learn from Winter Storm Fern
description: Winter Storm Fern, the second-deadliest winter storm in U.S. history, caused widespread power outages across the Southeast United States. How can utilities improve their response and harden their systems for the next one?
content: Winter Storm Fern, the second-deadliest winter storm in U.S. history, caused widespread power outages across the Southeast United States. How can utilities improve their response and harden their systems for the next one?
